name: New South Credit Union
description_short: New South Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering auto loans, signature loans, and deposit accounts with competitive rates and multiple branch locations.
description_long:
New South Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution that operates as a federally insured credit union. The organization serves members across multiple locations, including a main office and branches in Blaine and Maynardville, with customer service available by phone and email. Credit unions like New South operate on the cooperative principle where members are partial owners, distinguishing them from for-profit banks.

New South Credit Union offers a range of financial products including auto loans (new and used vehicles) with rates as low as 4.99% APR, signature loans starting at 6.99% APR, and standard deposit services. Members can access online and mobile banking platforms for account management, set up account alerts via email or text, and enroll in e-statements. The credit union maintains multiple service channels including lobby access, drive-through service, and digital banking options to serve member needs.

The organization distinguishes itself through flexible service hours, with drive-through access beginning at 8:30 AM on most days and lobby access starting at 9 AM, plus extended Wednesday morning openings at 10 AM for both channels. Members benefit from the cooperative structure, meaning they share in profits through competitive rates rather than supporting shareholder returns. The credit union emphasizes accessibility through various contact methods and digital convenience features.

The available information is somewhat limited to basic service offerings and contact details. Specific details about membership requirements, full product ranges, fee structures, and additional services beyond the featured loan products are not evident from the provided website content. The organization appears to serve a defined regional market rather than offering nationwide service.
services: New and used auto loans (4.99% APR starting rate)
Signature personal loans (6.99% APR starting rate)
Online banking platform with login and password reset
Account alerts via email and text message
Drive-through service (opens 8:30 AM weekdays, 10 AM Wednesdays)
In-person lobby service (opens 9 AM weekdays, 10 AM Wednesdays)
Phone customer service (main office, Blaine, Maynardville branches)
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.99% APR for new and used vehicles
Low signature loan rates beginning at 6.99% APR for personal borrowing needs
Multiple service channels including online banking, mobile app, and in-person branches
Extended drive-through hours (8:30 AM openings) for member convenience
Account alert system with email and text notification options
Free e-statement enrollment option for paperless, environmentally friendly banking
Member-owned cooperative structure with potential for better rates than for-profit banks
cons: Limited geographic service area with only three mentioned locations (main office, Blaine, Maynardville)
Website provides minimal information about membership eligibility, account fees, or complete product offerings
No information available regarding customer service responsiveness, member satisfaction, or complaint resolution processes
Limited details on savings account rates, CD offerings, or other deposit products beyond basic mentions
Rates shown are promotional minimums and actual approval rates may vary based on creditworthiness
best_for: Regional members in Blaine and Maynardville areas seeking competitive auto and personal loans
Borrowers with good credit looking for below-market loan rates from a member-owned institution
Individuals preferring drive-through banking convenience with extended early morning hours
diagnosis: New South Credit Union is best for members in its service territory (Blaine/Maynardville areas) who want competitive loan rates from a member-owned institution and value drive-through convenience. The main caveat is that the credit union's geographic footprint appears limited, and the website provides insufficient detail about membership requirements, full product offerings, and fee structures to make comprehensive lending comparisons.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: New South Credit Union (Knoxville, TN) | CreditDoc
meta_description: New South Credit Union — NCUA-insured credit union in Knoxville, TN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
